canonical_definition: A red-teaming framework that uses a large language model (GPT-4) to automatically generate adversarial injection prompts for attacking LLM agents.
papers: AdvAgent: Controllable Blackbox Red-teaming on Web Agents
UDora: A Unified Red Teaming Framework against LLM Agents by Dynamically Hijacking Their Own Reasoning
